sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ عُمَرُ زَمِيلَهُ عَنْ عَمَلِهِ الجَدِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Umer je pitao kolegu o novom poslu.
sentences.translationEn: Omar asked his colleague about his new job.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَهُ أَنَّ العَمَلَ صَعْبٌ لَكِنَّهُ مُمْتِعٌ.
sentences.translation: Rekao mu je da je posao težak ali zanimljiv.
sentences.translationEn: He told him that the work is hard but enjoyable.

sentences.translation: Radi s malim timom i voli ih.
sentences.translationEn: He works with a small team and likes them.

sentences.arabic: الرَّاتِبُ جَيِّدٌ وَالمَكَانُ قَرِيبٌ مِنَ البَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Plata je dobra i mjesto je blizu kuće.
sentences.translationEn: The salary is good and the place is close to home.
